name: pnpm-migrate
description: Migrate npm projects to pnpm from an isolated git worktree.

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && node --check src/cli.mjs && bash -n install.sh pnpm-migrate.sh scripts/benchmark-suite.sh scripts/benchmark-deterministic.sh scripts/eval-method.sh scripts/eval-target.sh scripts/test-installer-smoke.sh && tsx scripts/test-agent-availability.ts && tsx scripts/test-cleanup-agent.ts && tsx scripts/test-pr-green.ts && scripts/benchmark-suite.sh fixture
